title: Elevate '24 is coming to Chicago!
excerpt:
Elevate '24 is coming to Chicago!
Exciting news! We’re taking Elevate on the road this year with the launch of Elevate Summits. The Elevate Summit will bring the content and experience of Elevate New York to other cities…

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Elevate '24 is coming to Chicago!

Exciting news! We’re taking Elevate on the road this year with the launch of Elevate Summits. The Elevate Summit will bring the content and experience of Elevate New York to other cities in the US. The first stop will be Chicago on October 30th! We would love for you to join us for the day, here’s the link to register!

Linkedin post_Chicago (1)1620×1620 96.6 KB

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Dee! Next year we’re looking at holding summits in LA, Chicago, Dallas and Toronto however we’re always looking to add additional cities. You can fill out this form letting us know which one you’re interested in and we’ll be sure to contact you when we’re heading there: Stay updated as Elevate hits the road!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: @bridget.monday Toronto!! I will be there

posts.author: DeeMc (Dee Mc)
posts.cookedHtml: Perfect. I am in the Dallas area.
